$schema_note: Forge-replication task set for spar. 24 paired tasks. Each task has a one-line natural-language question and a ground-truth file:line answer. Ground truths pinned to spar v0.9.3-tip (commit bad85e6). Re-validate when the commit pin changes. See docs/research/forge-replication-protocol.md.

tasks.question: Find where AADL `in modes (...)` lists are stored on a component instance in the HIR.
Find the definition of the SystemOperationMode struct.
Find the predicate that decides whether a component is active in a given SOM.
Find the predicate that decides whether a connection is active in a given SOM.
Find the runner method that invokes mode-dependent analyses once per SOM.
Find where Context_Switch_Time inflates each thread's WCET by 2x in the RTA recurrence.
Find where the WCTT pass adds atomic-frame quantization (ceil(max_frame_bytes * 8e12 / link_rate_bps) ps per hop).
Find the PMOO/LUDB closed-form bound function for tree-shaped multiplexing.
Find the PiecewiseAffineArrivalCurve type definition.
Find the top-level command dispatch table in the spar CLI.
Find the cmd_analyze function in the spar CLI.
Find the function that converts rivet YAML artifacts to SysML v2 source.
Find the MCP tool that performs a single hypothetical-rebinding (verify_move).
Find the AADL lexer.
Find where the bus_bandwidth analysis sums per-stream throughput.
Find where ARINC-PARTITION-ISOLATION is enforced at Error severity per DO-297.
Find the v0.10.0 trace-topology design document.
Find the rivet self-description architecture artifact.
Find the PCAPNG FrameSource implementation.
Find the LLDP TopologySource implementation.
Find the function that exports mode reachability to NuSMV.
Find the entry point that renders an instance model to SVG.
Find the min-plus Lean skeleton for piecewise-affine arrival curves.
Find where the analysis emits an Error when a component has modes but no initial mode declared.
